temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) A man in a light-colored button-down shirt is in a dimly lit room. His phone, which is a flip phone, starts ringing with a distinct electronic ringtone. He looks down with a serious expression before reaching into his shirt pocket to retrieve the phone. (Storyline: The scene begins with a character being interrupted by a phone call, setting a tense and serious mood.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A loud, electronic ringtone plays.)
(00:03-00:05) The man brings the phone to his ear, his expression shifting to one of concern and seriousness as he listens to the person on the other end. He holds the phone to his right ear. (Storyline: The man's reaction to the phone call confirms that the news he is receiving is serious and unexpected, heightening the suspense.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Neutral, questioning. 2) Background sounds or music: The ringtone stops, and a low, tense musical score begins to play.)
(00:06-00:08) The scene cuts to a different man with long hair, wearing a brown jacket over a collared shirt and tie. He is in a busy office or control room, surrounded by other people and computer monitors. He looks up with a stern, questioning expression as he asks a question. (Storyline: This cut introduces a new character who is also involved in the unfolding situation, likely a superior or colleague, and raises a question about a broken promise.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Serious, demanding. 2) Background sounds or music: The tense musical score continues.)
